main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'aclarado insuficiente del SBS... agua bruta retenida' matches both anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals: sulfito 8.5, ORP -180, cond 1500->850, dP normal, agua bruta, P alta

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (oxidativo, biofouling, O-rings) todas con descarte explicito

recommended_action.justification: C4: flush a drenaje hasta sulfito<0.5, ORP>0, cond<150, rechazo>97% - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (probing tubos, sulfito serie temporal, agua bruta prohibition)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: sulfito<0.5 + ORP normal pero cond>300 + rechazo<95% -> daño/bypass

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; respuesta excelente, sin CIP, alternativas correctas
